'''√d-ng-s''' ('''kadangas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cultivate|cultivate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cultivate|cultivate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √d-ng-s
|-
! Lemma
| kadangas
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidangas || jidangas || shidangas || kidangas
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudangas || jujudangas || shushudangas || kukudangas
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudangas || judangas || shudangas || kudangas
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudangas || judangas || shudangas || kudangas
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedangas || jedangas || shedangas || kedangas
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodangas || jojodangas || shoshodangas || kokodangas
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodangas || jodangas || shodangas || kodangas
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodangas || jodangas || shodangas || kodangas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dangas || dangas || dangas || dangas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dangas || dangas || dangas || dangas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dangas || dangas || dangas || dangas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dangas || dangas || dangas || dangas
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thædangas || jædangas || shædangas || kædangas
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadangas || jajadangas || shashadangas || kakadangas
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadangas || jadangas || shadangas || kadangas
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadangas || jadangas || shadangas || kadangas
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shadangas
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshadangas
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishadangas
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shadangasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshadangasnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishadangasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shadangasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshadangasnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishadangasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shadangasro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshadangasnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishadangasro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shadangasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshadangasnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishadangasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shadangassher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshadangasnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishadangassher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shadangasng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshadangasnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishadangasng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shadangasya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshadangasnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishadangasya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shadangasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshadangasnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishadangasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shadangasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshadangasnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishadangasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shadangasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadangasnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadangasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shadangasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshadangasnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadangasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shadangasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshadangasnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishadangasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shadangasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadangasnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadangasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shadangasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshadangasnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadangasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shadangasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshadangasnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishadangasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shadangasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshadangasnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishadangasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shadangasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshadangasnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadangasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shadangasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshadangasnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishadangasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shadangasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshadangasnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishadangasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shadangasmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadangasnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadangasmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
